message_ids.behavior: Skip a bounded unknown message ID and continue processing later known traffic.
message_ids.test_plan: Send an unknown ID between discovery and Ping traffic over the real simulator wire path; require both operations to complete and CloseReason to remain nil.

enum_values.behavior: Preserve the numeric protobuf value at the generated wire boundary; handwritten behavior must reject or ignore an unrecognized value without panic.
enum_values.test_plan: Inject unknown values into each M1 enum-bearing state and command family, verify panic-free decode, and assert the documented typed behavior before raising evidence.

fields.behavior: Let the protobuf runtime decode unknown fields without treating generated presence as handwritten support.
fields.test_plan: Append valid unknown fields to representative M1 messages and verify known fields and subsequent frames remain usable under race and fuzz checks.

messages.name: HelloRequest
messages.notes: Starts the Native API session after the transport is established.

messages.name: HelloResponse
messages.notes: Validates the peer hello and records the advertised API version and name.

messages.name: DisconnectRequest
messages.notes: Acknowledges a peer-requested disconnect and records the session close reason.

messages.name: DisconnectResponse
messages.notes: Completes the Native API disconnect exchange.

messages.name: PingRequest
messages.notes: Receives and answers peer liveness probes.

messages.name: PingResponse
messages.notes: Completes the caller-controlled Ping operation.

messages.name: DeviceInfoRequest
messages.notes: Starts the context-bounded, serialized device information exchange.

messages.name: DeviceInfoResponse
messages.notes: Completes DeviceInfo with the peer identity description; a response after timeout closes the ambiguous connection.

messages.name: ListEntitiesRequest
messages.notes: Starts bounded entity discovery for the registry exposed to MGMT.

messages.name: ListEntitiesDoneResponse
messages.notes: Atomically completes discovery; duplicate completion is harmless.

messages.name: SubscribeStatesRequest
messages.notes: Requests the initial state snapshot and later pushed state changes.

messages.name: ListEntitiesBinarySensorResponse
messages.notes: Adds binary-sensor metadata to the immutable registry snapshot.

messages.name: BinarySensorStateResponse
messages.notes: Publishes binary-sensor state to subscribed callbacks and MGMT.

messages.name: ListEntitiesSensorResponse
messages.notes: Adds numeric sensor metadata to the immutable registry snapshot.

messages.name: SensorStateResponse
messages.notes: Publishes numeric sensor state; missing and NaN policy remains tracked by issue #9.

messages.name: ListEntitiesTextSensorResponse
messages.notes: Adds text-sensor metadata; MGMT runtime evidence remains tracked by issue #9.

messages.name: TextSensorStateResponse
messages.notes: Publishes text-sensor state; MGMT runtime evidence remains tracked by issue #9.

messages.name: ListEntitiesSwitchResponse
messages.notes: Adds switch metadata to the immutable registry snapshot.

messages.name: SwitchStateResponse
messages.notes: Publishes observed switch state.

messages.name: SwitchCommandRequest
messages.notes: Sends a serialized switch command without implicit replay.

messages.name: ListEntitiesNumberResponse
messages.notes: Adds number metadata and bounds to the registry snapshot.

messages.name: NumberStateResponse
messages.notes: Publishes observed number state.

messages.name: NumberCommandRequest
messages.notes: Sends a serialized number command without implicit replay.

messages.name: ListEntitiesButtonResponse
messages.notes: Adds button metadata; MGMT command evidence remains tracked by issue #9.

messages.name: ButtonCommandRequest
messages.notes: Sends a non-idempotent button command without implicit replay; MGMT evidence remains tracked by issue #9.

messages.name: ListEntitiesFanResponse
messages.notes: Adds generic ESPHome Fan metadata for the conveyor profile.

messages.name: FanStateResponse
messages.notes: Publishes Fan power, speed, oscillation, direction, and preset state.

messages.name: FanCommandRequest
messages.notes: Sends generic ESPHome Fan commands, including the conveyor cleanup stop.

messages.name: ListEntitiesLightResponse
messages.notes: Adds generic ESPHome Light metadata and supported color modes.

messages.name: LightStateResponse
messages.notes: Publishes Light power, brightness, and color state for the conveyor status light.

messages.name: LightCommandRequest
messages.notes: Sends generic ESPHome Light commands, including RGB status colors.

messages.name: SubscribeLogsRequest
messages.notes: Starts a bounded log subscription at the requested level.

messages.name: SubscribeLogsResponse
messages.notes: Dispatches device log records away from the network read loop.
